title: Stamina
description: Add stamina to sprinting and swimming based off your current health
body: ## Summary Stamina is a new mechanic that lets the player sprint and swim. ## Links [](https://bisecthosting.com/Insane) [](https://www.patreon.com/insane96mcp) [](https://discord.gg/mUaszws) ## The mod Stamina is given by the current player health, the more health, the more stamina the player has. The current stamina can be seen on the player health bar. If the stamina completely depletes, you'll no longer be able to run again until the stamina restores. A new Vigour enchantment and effect has been added for chestplates that increases max stamina. ![Stamina showcase](https://iili.io/2MtxTPI.gif) This mod was part of [IguanaTweaks Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-reborn) ## Modpack Permissions Go on.
